# Relief from Stay - When Creditors Lift Protection [2026]
> What is a motion for relief from stay? Learn when creditors can lift your bankruptcy protection, how to oppose, and deadlines. 2026 guide.

## About
relieffromstay.org is part of the Open Bankruptcy Project (openbankruptcyproject.org), a 501(c)(3) nonprofit building free, open-source tools for bankruptcy court transparency.

## Key Pages
- Adequate Protection Payments in Bankruptcy: https://relieffromstay.org/adequate-protection.html
- Motion for Relief from Stay - Car Repossession: https://relieffromstay.org/car-repo.html
- Consent Orders and Stipulated Relief from Stay: https://relieffromstay.org/consent-order.html
- When Creditors Skip the Court: Unauthorized Repossession During Bankruptcy: https://relieffromstay.org/creditor-violations.html
- Relief from Stay for Cause - Section 362(d)(1): https://relieffromstay.org/for-cause.html
- How to Respond to a Motion for Relief from Stay: https://relieffromstay.org/how-to-respond.html
- Relief from Stay - When Creditors Lift Protection: https://relieffromstay.org/
- Relief from Stay for Lack of Equity - Section 362(d)(2): https://relieffromstay.org/lack-of-equity.html
- Relief from Stay for Mortgage Foreclosure - Stopping and Responding: https://relieffromstay.org/mortgage-foreclosure.html
- In Rem Relief from Stay Against Serial Filers - Section 362(d)(4): https://relieffromstay.org/serial-filer.html
- Relief from Stay Hearing Timeline - How Long Does It Take?: https://relieffromstay.org/timeline.html
- Privacy Policy: https://relieffromstay.org/privacy.html

- Website: https://openbankruptcyproject.org

## License
Content is provided for educational purposes. Data sourced from the Federal Judicial Center Integrated Database (4.9M cases, 94 districts).
